name: yuval-core
description: v0.8.1 — Yuval Core workspace plugin: ideation scaffolding (init, refresh-persona), code-workspace extension (init-code, write-brief, promote-to-code, report-back), Karpathy-style wiki discipline with proactive bookkeeping triggers and live session pages, session continuity, persona management (v2 — mode-switcher + visual-first), framework-canonical memory protocol shared by ideation and code wikis.
